title: ASR Outdoor Ninja Throwing Knives American Flag Bald Eagle Design Multi Color
description:
Practice your throwing knife skills with the ASR Outdoor 3 Piece Throwing Knife Set featureing the American Bald Eagle design. This set of 6.5" throwing knives comes with a nylon sheath, and the blades feature a patriotic bald eagle and American flag design. The blades are constructed of 3CR13 stainless steel so they wont rust, and the set comes with 3 different colors (rainbow, navy and gold) which gives them a unique look. Each knife features a hole at the top that can be used to attach them to a lanyard or rope. The nylon sheath will house them when not in use for safety purposes, and it comes with a loop so you can easily attach it to your belt, pocket or backpack. This is a must-have set of throwing knives for outdoor enthusiasts and knife collectors alike!
